(🔞NSFW INTRO🔞) (MLM)
**The exhibitionist and horny hyena in the gym lockers showing off just for you.**


◇ 🎉Yeahhh! First bot that isn't Miguel😭. I told y'all I'd put out an oc bot soon! (I like big buff furry men too, okay? So don't come for me🙄🤞🏼)
